description_long: This is a rectangular, multi-shelf storage unit constructed primarily from wood with a metal frame. The shelving unit features four horizontal shelves, each divided into three open cubby compartments, providing ample space for storing or displaying items. The frame is supported by four visible caster wheels, allowing for easy mobility across flat surfaces. The wood grain is visible on all surfaces, giving the unit a warm, natural appearance, while the metal frame adds structural strength and a modern industrial touch. The open design allows for visibility and access from the front, making it suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, libraries, or public spaces. There are no doors, handles, or glass panels, and the shelves are open and accessible.
description: A mobile, open-shelved wooden storage unit with a metal frame and four caster wheels, featuring four shelves divided into cubby compartments. The design is modern and functional, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves divided into three cubby compartments each, framed by metal sides and supported by four caster wheels.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the unit, the wood grain on the side panel, and two of the caster wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the open cubby compartments and the back of the metal frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow wooden side panel and two caster wheels.
